# Content Campaign

## Agent Configuration

| Field               | Value                                           |
|---------------------|-------------------------------------------------|
| Intent              | Check if the rules are up to date. Consider modern approaches to JavaScript, such as back-end development with Node.js, or developing complex web applications using frameworks such as React and Angular. Flag rules that are outdated or missing modern context.                            |
| Search Scope        | Rules in the "Rules to better JavaScript and jQuery" category                      |
| Processing Priority | Process the rule "Do you avoid relying on JavaScript for crucial actions" first. Then process all remaining rules sorted by lastUpdated ascending (oldest first).               |
| Issue Preferences   | Generate up to 5 issues per run.                 |
| PR Preferences      | Bundle up to 5 rules per PR.                    |
| Label               | `update-rules-better-javascript`                      |
| Created             | 2026-04-24                    |
